tagline:
I lead strategic projects that transform organizational
complexity into clarity and measurable impact.
about:
Looking back at my career, three themes have been constant: Technology, Finance, and Transformation. They shaped how I started in industry, how I moved into consulting, and how I approach the work I do today.

I began in finance and operations at Arvato Supply Chain Solutions, where I led my first large-scale program - an S/4HANA migration across two sites - and learned that most bottlenecks in a business aren't numbers problems, they're system and process problems. That experience pulled me toward the intersection of finance, IT and the people who have to make both work in practice.

Today, as a Senior Business Consultant at BearingPoint in the Telco, Media and Technology practice, I lead transformation programs where those three threads come together. My work spans process redesign and change management, program and project leadership across initiatives, and building automation and AI solutions that reduce manual effort so teams can focus on decisions that matter. I'm also part of the core team of BearingPoint's AI Networks initiative, shaping our AI solution portfolio and bringing it to clients. In parallel, I'm exploring how agentic AI and prompt-driven development change the way business solutions get built and deployed.

What I care about across all of this isn't technology in isolation. It's aligning stakeholders, designing transformations that stick, and helping organizations adopt change with confidence.

highlights: Led process and system transformation workstreams within a multi-year FI S/4HANA migration for 2.000 users across Germany; delivered on time
Designed and rolled out a change management program including an AI-based support bot and automated ticket reporting, reducing support effort by 0.7 to 1 FTE
Held full delivery ownership as Engagement Manager for a two-consultant team; coordinated cross-functional workstreams across business, IT, and operations
Modeled, documented, and optimized client IT landscapes through Enterprise Architecture Management, enabling transparency and informed decision-making
Contributed to the development of six BearingPoint IP assets as an Innovation Agent
Core team member of BearingPoint's AI Networks initiative; co-developing the AI solution portfolio and leading go-to-market activities to position offerings with clients
Regular internal knowledge transfer sessions for ~100 colleagues across topics such as Automation & AI
Led FI S/4HANA migration across two German sites for 180 users; managed ~1.000 test cases through to Go-Live
Delivered internal optimization projects, including automated invoice posting and strategic realignment of the Financial Services department
Inhouse consulting lead for two RPA use cases, from scoping to implementation
Led end-to-end onboarding of new clients in Healthcare and Tech, covering system configuration and functional setup
Responsible for training and development of five dual-study students across rotations within the department
Supported the migration from IBM Lotus Notes to Office 365 for ~1.000 employees
Designed the company's first internal Robotic Process Automation (RPA) use case, resulting in 0.5 FTE savings
Performed asset management optimization and provided local IT support
Responsible for budget planning, reporting, and forecasting for the Retail (Gas Stations) division
Provided management with data-driven analysis and strategic reports
Built a group-wide cash flow statement within SAP
Implemented MultiCash software to streamline global payment transactions
